# `draw.pen`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `polylines`
> **Wire kind:** `pen`

Draw a freehand pen stroke through N world anchors. Renders as an
OPEN polyline (mirrors `polyline` but without the auto-close).
Supply 2..500 anchors (validator pins this range, matching
invinite's stroke cap). Mirrors invinite's `pen-tool.ts` shape.

## Anchors

`anchors` — `ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>` of length 2..500

Anchor count: 2..500.

## Signature

```ts
function pen(anchors: ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.pen(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.pen demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.pen(
                [
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.open },
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                ],
                { color: "#1e293b", lineWidth: 2 },
            );
        },
    });
```
